subject: Lane_01 CTO review request for AIER Code canon/spec draft stack
body: Please review packet AMD_LANE03_AIER_CODE_CANON_SPEC_STACK_2026-04-26 and its 11 draft files under docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/CANON/. Requested review points: document stack consistency, canon drift risk, architecture correctness, V0/V1 boundary safety, roadmap-spec blocking of premature runtime/backend/productization, file split/amend/defer recommendations, and naming/path normalization before approval. Boundary: this is review evidence only, not approval; NTS final approval is required; Lane_02 is deferred for this phase per NTS direction. Requested verdicts: ENDORSE / AMEND / OBJECT / SPLIT / DEFER.
requested_action: Provide Lane_01 CTO review evidence for the AIER Code canon/spec draft stack packet, including a verdict of ENDORSE, AMEND, OBJECT, SPLIT, or DEFER.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_01 identifies canon drift risks or authority conflicts.
Lane_01 reviews architecture correctness and V0/V1 boundary safety.
Lane_01 confirms whether the roadmap-spec draft blocks premature runtime, backend, and productization work.
Lane_01 recommends ENDORSE, AMEND, OBJECT, SPLIT, or DEFER.
